# Planet Fitness · Fitness

Generated: Jul 21, 2026, 7:09 PM

- [Bugs and stability](#theme-bugs_stability)

## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      4 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Jul 10, 2026 - Jul 18, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _AJey Calloway_, Jul 18, 2026, 1/5: "I'm completely over this app. I joined Planet Fitness 2 weeks ago and still have not been able to get this app to work. I tried logging in half a dozen times and it freezes. I've only been able to successfully login 1 time and even then it never gave to QR code so that I can scan everytime I enter Planet Fitness. I'm sooo over this and it's just frustrating. Even the team members that work there couldn't figure out why this is happening."
            2. _Zachary Bohannon_, Jul 13, 2026, 1/5: "awful designed app i literally cannot log in to the app it's so broken"
            3. _Emily Foster_, Jul 10, 2026, 1/5: "horrible service requires close to 100 bucks just to cancel any membership and workers are rude. Even after you pay the membership they take another payment for what the "last month" would be even if you don't go anymore. there cleaner and nicer places to go for free with kind workers than this place app can also lag a lot and not work for up to 20-25 min never again"

## **Sync and accounts** {#theme-sync_accounts}

   **Sync and accounts.**
      2 recent review(s) mention sync and accounts.
      Review window: Jul 9, 2026 - Jul 13, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention sync, backup, login, or accounts. This points to trust and cross-device workflow expectations.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Akaia_, Jul 13, 2026, 1/5: "The App doesn't even allow you to sign in. I can't check into the gym if I can't sign into the app 🤦🏽‍♀️"
            2. _Ghost Shadow_, Jul 9, 2026, 1/5: "worse app ever. can't login keep stating error. done uninstalled and reinstalled the app and still getting login issues. tomorrow going to cancel my gym membership."
